changeSet.author: claude

delete.where: test_id = (SELECT test_id FROM temp_test_ids WHERE test_name = 'Macroscopie – Col Leucorrhées')

changeSet.author: claude
changeSet.comment: Add Col-Abondance child test (appears if PRESENCE)

delete.where: test_id = (SELECT test_id FROM temp_test_ids WHERE test_name = 'Macroscopie – Col-Abondance')

changeSet.author: claude

delete.where: test_id = (SELECT test_id FROM temp_test_ids WHERE test_name = 'Macroscopie – Col-Aspect')

changeSet.author: claude

delete.where: test_id = (SELECT test_id FROM temp_test_ids WHERE test_name = 'Macroscopie – Col-Couleur')

changeSet.author: claude

delete.where: test_id = (SELECT test_id FROM temp_test_ids WHERE test_name = 'Macroscopie – Col-Autre (Odeur)')

changeSet.author: claude
changeSet.comment: Add Muqueuse Leucorrhées tests (similar structure to Col)
